paper_title: Improving Commonsense Question Answering by Graph-based Iterative Retrieval over Multiple Knowledge Sources
problem_addressed: Multi-value property of knowledge in question answering systems
proposed_solution: A novel question-answering method using graph-based iterative retrieval over multiple knowledge sources
key_innovation: Engaging multiple knowledge sources to establish precise connections between background knowledge and the original question
related_work: Two-stage framework for incorporating external knowledge in question answering systems
title: Improving Commonsense Question Answering by Graph-based Iterative Retrieval over Multiple Knowledge Sources
